items.title: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
items.summary: The data bank which contains medical data of 500,000 people said no personally identifiable information had been hacked.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: AngelList USVC: Invest in startups from $500
items.summary: AngelList launches USVC, a venture fund open to all US investors with a $500 entry, aiming to democratise startup investing.
